summary: Ultra‑matrix recording praised as incredible – a must‑listen according to the reviewer.
review: The lone review gives this show a perfect five‑star rating, calling it “incredible” and simply urging listeners to enjoy it. No specific remarks are made about the performance or audio characteristics, so the praise is overall enthusiasm rather than detailed analysis.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief, five‑star review; strong positive sentiment but no detail to assess nuances, so rating is based mainly on the high star count.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No technical comments provided; reviewer’s enthusiasm and the “ultramatrix” label imply a high‑quality source.
